children.label: A
children.text: the actual, necessary costs and expenses incurred by the Corporation as receiver for a covered financial company in liquidating a covered financial company; and

children.label: B
children.text: any obligations that the Corporation as receiver for a covered financial company determines are necessary and appropriate to facilitate the smooth and orderly liquidation of the covered financial company.

children.heading: Bankruptcy Code
children.label: 2 Bankruptcy Code
children.text: The term “Bankruptcy Code” means title 11.

children.heading: Bridge financial company
children.label: 3 Bridge financial company
children.text: The term “bridge financial company” means a new financial company organized by the Corporation in accordance with for the purpose of resolving a covered financial company.section 5390(h) of this title

children.heading: Claim
children.label: 4 Claim
children.text: The term “claim” means any right to payment, whether or not such right is reduced to judgment, liquidated, unliquidated, fixed, contingent, matured, unmatured, disputed, undisputed, legal, equitable, secured, or unsecured.

children.heading: Company
children.label: 5 Company
children.text: The term “company” has the same meaning as in , except that such term includes any company described in paragraph (11), the majority of the securities of which are owned by the United States or any State.section 1841(b) of this title

children.heading: Court
children.label: 6 Court
children.text: The term “Court” means the United States District Court for the District of Columbia, unless the context otherwise requires.

children.label: A
children.text: is registered with the Commission under section 78(b) of title 15; ando

children.label: B
children.text: is a member of SIPC.

children.label: A
children.text: means a financial company for which a determination has been made under ; andsection 5383(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: does not include an insured depository institution.

children.label: A
children.text: an insured depository institution;

children.label: B
children.text: an insurance company; or

children.label: C
children.text: a covered broker or dealer.

children.heading: Definitions relating to covered brokers and dealers
children.label: 10 Definitions relating to covered brokers and dealers
children.text: The terms “customer”, “customer name securities”, “customer property”, and “net equity” in the context of a covered broker or dealer, have the same meanings as in section 78 of title 15.lll

children.label: A
children.text: is incorporated or organized under any provision of Federal law or the laws of any State;

children.label: i
children.text: a bank holding company, as defined in ;section 1841(a) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: a nonbank financial company supervised by the Board of Governors;

children.label: iii
children.text: any company that is predominantly engaged in activities that the Board of Governors has determined are financial in nature or incidental thereto for purposes of other than a company described in clause (i) or (ii); orsection 1843(k) of this title

children.label: iv
children.text: any subsidiary of any company described in any of clauses (i) through (iii) that is predominantly engaged in activities that the Board of Governors has determined are financial in nature or incidental thereto for purposes of (other than a subsidiary that is an insured depository institution or an insurance company); andsection 1843(k) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: is not a Farm Credit System institution chartered under and subject to the provisions of the Farm Credit Act of 1971, as amended ( et seq.), a governmental entity, or a regulated entity, as defined under .12 U.S.C. 2001section 4502(20) of this title

children.heading: Fund
children.label: 12 Fund
children.text: The term “Fund” means the Orderly Liquidation Fund established under .section 5390(n) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: engaged in the business of insurance;

children.label: B
children.text: subject to regulation by a State insurance regulator; and

children.label: C
children.text: covered by a State law that is designed to specifically deal with the rehabilitation, liquidation, or insolvency of an insurance company.

children.heading: Nonbank financial company
children.label: 14 Nonbank financial company
children.text: The term “nonbank financial company” has the same meaning as in .section 5311(a)(4)(C) of this title

children.heading: Nonbank financial company supervised by the Board of Governors
children.label: 15 Nonbank financial company supervised by the Board of Governors
children.text: The term “nonbank financial company supervised by the Board of Governors” has the same meaning as in .section 5311(a)(4)(D) of this title

children.heading: SIPC
children.label: 16 SIPC
children.text: The term “SIPC” means the Securities Investor Protection Corporation.

children.heading: Definitional criteria
children.label: b Definitional criteria
children.text: For purpose of the definition of the term “financial company” under subsection (a)(11), no company shall be deemed to be predominantly engaged in activities that the Board of Governors has determined are financial in nature or incidental thereto for purposes of , if the consolidated revenues of such company from such activities constitute less than 85 percent of the total consolidated revenues of such company, as the Corporation, in consultation with the Secretary, shall establish by regulation. In determining whether a company is a financial company under this subchapter, the consolidated revenues derived from the ownership or control of a depository institution shall be included.section 1843(k) of this title
